Google.overview: Google is a global technology leader focusing on search, cloud computing, online advertising technologies, and hardware, renowned for its highly engineering-driven culture.
Google.hiring_process: Typically consists of an Online Coding Assessment, followed by 3-4 Technical Rounds focusing on core DSA and System Design, ending with a 'Googleyness' (behavioral) round.
Google.technical_rounds: In-depth testing on Data Structures & Algorithms, complex problem solving, space/time complexity optimization, and system design for scale.
Google.hr_rounds: Focuses on 'Googleyness'—assessing cognitive ability, leadership, cultural fit, ethics, and collaboration in ambiguous situations.
Google.prep_tips: Practice medium-to-hard LeetCode problems, write clean code on paper/whiteboard, explain your thought process aloud, and study Google's leadership principles.

Microsoft.overview: Microsoft is a multinational technology corporation that produces computer software, consumer electronics, personal computers, and cloud services (Azure).
Microsoft.hiring_process: Consists of an Online Assessment (OA) with coding questions, followed by 3-4 Technical Interview rounds, and an final interview with a Hiring Manager.
Microsoft.technical_rounds: Algorithms, system design, coding correctness, edge case handling, and computer science fundamentals (OS, DB, Threads).
Microsoft.hr_rounds: Assesses growth mindset, passion for technology, communication skills, adaptability, and collaboration within diverse teams.
Microsoft.prep_tips: Focus on solid software design, review basic data structure implementations, practice system design basics, and demonstrate Microsoft's core value: a growth mindset.

Amazon.overview: Amazon is an e-commerce, cloud computing (AWS), digital streaming, and artificial intelligence giant, driven by customer obsession and operational excellence.
Amazon.hiring_process: Consists of an Online Assessment (Coding + Work Style Simulation), followed by 3-4 Technical Rounds where Leadership Principles are heavily integrated.
Amazon.technical_rounds: Deep dive into DSA, coding efficiency, object-oriented design, and system architecture for large scale systems.
Amazon.hr_rounds: Amazon does not have standard HR rounds; instead, every technical round incorporates questions testing the 16 Leadership Principles using the STAR method.
Amazon.prep_tips: Prepare 2-3 detailed behavioral stories for each of Amazon's Leadership Principles using the STAR (Situation, Task, Action, Result) method. Practice coding under time limits.

TCS.overview: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) is an Indian multinational information technology services and consulting company, one of the largest IT service brands globally.
TCS.hiring_process: Typically conducted through TCS NQT (National Qualifier Test) containing Cognitive & Technical sections, followed by Technical, Managerial, and HR interview rounds.
TCS.technical_rounds: Tests programming basics, database queries (SQL), computer network concepts, software engineering cycles, and simple coding tasks.
TCS.hr_rounds: Checks willingness to relocate, shift flexibility, communication skills, career aspirations, and background verification details.
TCS.prep_tips: Practice TCS NQT mock tests, revise OOP concepts and basic SQL queries, prepare a clear self-introduction, and highlight your college academic projects.

Infosys.overview: Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting, serving clients in over 50 countries.
Infosys.hiring_process: Conducted through InfyTQ or HackWithInfy, followed by a Technical Interview and an HR Interview.
Infosys.technical_rounds: Covers programming fundamentals, object-oriented programming, data structures, DBMS, and questions on your resume projects.
Infosys.hr_rounds: Assesses soft skills, behavioral traits, work ethic, willingness to learn new technologies, and relocation choices.
Infosys.prep_tips: Be thorough with your resume projects and the technology stacks used. Revise basic database concepts and be confident in explaining your role in academic projects.

Accenture.overview: Accenture is a professional services company specializing in digital, cloud, security, and strategy services on a global scale.
Accenture.hiring_process: Consists of an Cognitive & Technical Assessment, followed by a Coding Assessment, a Communication Assessment, and a final Technical + HR Interview.
Accenture.technical_rounds: Focuses on pseudo-codes, MS Office basics, network fundamentals, cloud security concepts, basic programming, and final resume project discussions.
Accenture.hr_rounds: Evaluates candidate adaptability, team synergy, situational judgement, problem-solving mindset, and soft skills.
Accenture.prep_tips: Practice solving pseudo-codes quickly, prepare for the automated communication assessment by speaking clearly, and structure your project details chronologically.

Capgemini.overview: Capgemini is a French multinational information technology service and consulting company, specializing in engineering services, digital transformation, and cloud.
Capgemini.hiring_process: Consists of a pseudo-code assessment, English communication assessment, game-based aptitude test, followed by technical and HR interview rounds.
Capgemini.technical_rounds: Covers core programming, database concepts, data structures, cloud computing basics, and technical questions on academic internships/projects.
Capgemini.hr_rounds: Assesses cultural fit, confidence, flexibility, work-ethics, and checks academic qualifications.
Capgemini.prep_tips: Prepare for the game-based aptitude test (which tests memory, concentration, and logical reasoning) and practice interpreting C/Java code snippets.

Wipro.overview: Wipro Limited is a leading technology services and consulting company focused on building innovative solutions that address clients' most complex digital transformation needs.
Wipro.hiring_process: Conducted via Wipro Elite NLTH (National Level Talent Hunt) comprising Aptitude, Technical MCQs, and Coding, followed by Technical and HR interview rounds.
Wipro.technical_rounds: Covers basic data structures, OOPs, database management systems (DBMS), operating systems (OS), and simple programming problems.
Wipro.hr_rounds: Evaluates communication, adaptability, availability for shifts, relocation, and career commitment.
Wipro.prep_tips: Focus on coding basics like string operations and arrays. Ensure your fundamentals in DBMS, OS, and computer networks are clear, and highlight team achievements in your resume.
